description: Fixtures for new startup-ops workflows (2 per workflow, 8 total)

input.business_hypothesis: AI-powered writing assistant for content marketing teams can replace freelance writers at 1/3 the cost
input.target_customer: Content marketing managers at Series A-C startups with 5-20 person marketing teams
input.market_data: Content marketing market growing 15% YoY, 3 competitors in AI writing space

input.business_hypothesis: Two-sided marketplace connecting freelance designers with early-stage startups needing brand identity
input.target_customer: Freelance designers seeking consistent work and seed-stage startups needing affordable design
input.market_data: Freelance design market $12B, 5 existing platforms but none focused on startup branding

input.company_narrative: We help remote teams build culture through async-first team building activities
input.metrics: 500 active teams, $50K MRR, 40% MoM growth, 90% retention at 6 months
input.target_investors: Seed-stage VCs focused on future-of-work and remote work tools

input.company_narrative: Developer tools platform that automates CI/CD pipeline optimization using ML
input.metrics: $2M ARR, 150 enterprise customers, 3x net revenue retention, 18-month payback
input.target_investors: Series A VCs with developer tools thesis and enterprise SaaS focus

input.company_stage: Pre-seed with MVP launched, 50 beta users, 20% weekly active usage
input.funding_target: $1.5M seed round for engineering hires and go-to-market
input.existing_materials: Draft pitch deck and basic financial model

input.company_stage: Seed stage with $500K ARR, 25 paying customers, 120% net retention
input.funding_target: $8M Series A for scaling sales team and product development
input.existing_materials: Complete pitch deck, financial model, and data room with customer case studies

input.problem_hypothesis: Engineering managers at 50-200 person companies struggle to track developer productivity without micromanaging
input.target_segment: VP Engineering and Engineering Managers at Series B-C companies with 50-200 engineers

input.problem_hypothesis: Remote workers aged 25-35 feel isolated and struggle to build professional relationships outside their immediate team
input.target_segment: Remote workers at tech companies, 2-5 years into career, living in major metro areas
